archimate:Grouping.name: Technical Infrastructure Functional content
archimate:Grouping.documentation:
Definition: Technical Infrastructure Functional Content ABB is a Grouping of hardware, software, and network components that support the operation and functionality of an organization's IT systems and cloud services.
Source: Inspired in Gartner
Source reference: https://www.gartner.com/smarterwithgartner/10-must-have-competencies-for-infrastructure-operations-leaders
LOST view: Technical view - infrastructure
Viewpoint: Highlevel viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/TechnicalInfrastructureFunctionalContentGrouping
ABB name: eira:TechnicalInfrastructureFunctionalContentGrouping
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/TechnicalInfrastructureFunctionalContentGrouping
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalInfrastructure

properties.value: Technical Infrastructure Functional Content ABB is a Grouping of hardware, software, and network components that support the operation and functionality of an organization's IT systems and cloud services.
